tasks.label: deploy updated Morgan avatar UI
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; npm run build; $stamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMddHHmmss"; $deployDir = ".deploy"; $stage = Join-Path $deployDir "runtime-live-$stamp"; $zip = Join-Path $deployDir "morgan-d-cfo-live-$stamp.zip"; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $stage -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $stage -Force | Out-Null; foreach ($item in @("package.json", "package-lock.json", "dist", "manifest", "ToolingManifest.json")) { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $item -Destination (Join-Path $stage $item) -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $stage "scripts") -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -LiteralPath "scripts/start-production.cjs" -Destination (Join-Path $stage "scripts/start-production.cjs") -Force; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $zip) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zip -Force }; $items = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $stage -Force; Compress-Archive -LiteralPath $items.FullName -DestinationPath $zip -Force; $zipFull = (Resolve-Path $zip).Path; Write-Output "ZIP=$zipFull"; az account set --subscription "260948a4-1d5e-42c8-b095-33a6641ad189"; Write-Output "AZ_ACCOUNT_SET_OK"; az webapp deploy --resource-group "rg-morgan-finance-agent" --name "morganfinanceagent-webapp" --src-path $zipFull --type zip --async false --output json; Write-Output "DEPLOY_OK"; az webapp config set --resource-group "rg-morgan-finance-agent" --name "morganfinanceagent-webapp" --startup-file "npm start" --output none; Write-Output "STARTUP_OK"; az webapp config appsettings set --resource-group "rg-morgan-finance-agent" --name "morganfinanceagent-webapp" --settings "AVATAR_BACKGROUND_COLOR=#FFFFFF" "AVATAR_STYLE=business" "VOICE_ENABLED_DEFAULT=true" "WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION=~20" "SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT=false" "ENABLE_ORYX_BUILD=false" "NODE_ENV=production" "AUTONOMOUS_WORKDAY_ENABLED=true" "AUTONOMOUS_WORKDAY_TIME_ZONE=Australia/Sydney" "AUTONOMOUS_WORKDAY_START_HOUR=9" "AUTONOMOUS_WORKDAY_END_HOUR=17" "AUTONOMOUS_WORKDAY_INTERVAL_MINUTES=25" --output none; Write-Output "SETTINGS_OK"; az webapp restart --resource-group "rg-morgan-finance-agent" --name "morganfinanceagent-webapp" --output none; Write-Output "RESTART_OK"

tasks.label: verify D-CFO Kanban generator
verify Teams federation status function
